TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Baldwin Lonsdale ryax sa tay nqu tay , Baldwin Lonsdale, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay ) mrhuw Vanuatu ta' misuw hya' ga Baldwin Lonsdale, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1948,Baldwin Lonsdale htagan beh sa Banks Islands Mota Lava. kawas tay 2017,6 byacing 17 ryax.nbu wal mhuqil la maki Port Vila.(68 kawas) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βal*win lons~ɕ*ale rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , βal*win lons~ɕ*ale, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ) mrħuw *anuatu taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βal*win lons~ɕ*ale, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****,βal*win lons~ɕ*ale ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βanks~ɕ is~ɕlan*s~ɕ mota la*a. kawas~ɕ taj ****,* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax.nβu wal mħuqil la maki port *ila.(** kawas~ɕ) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Baldwin Lonsdale ryax sa tay nqu tay , Baldwin Lonsdale, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay ) mrhuw Vanuatu ta' misuw hya' ga Baldwin Lonsdale, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1948,Baldwin Lonsdale htagan beh sa Banks Islands Mota Lava. kawas tay 2017,6 byacing 17 ryax.nbu wal mhuqil la maki Port Vila.(68 kawas) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βal*win lons~ɕ*ale rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj , βal*win lons~ɕ*ale, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ) mrħuw *anuatu taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βal*win lons~ɕ*ale, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****,βal*win lons~ɕ*ale ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa βanks~ɕ is~ɕlan*s~ɕ mota la*a. kawas~ɕ taj ****,* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax.nβu wal mħuqil la maki port *ila.(** kawas~ɕ) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
